options.systemMessage:
FORMATTING REQUIREMENTS

* Use proper line breaks.
* Use blank lines between sections.
* Use bullet points instead of paragraphs where possible.
* Never compress information into one sentence.
* Each section must start on a new line.
* Student Information must be displayed as separate fields.

ADDITIONAL REPORT SECTIONS

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

📊 CAREER READINESS SCORE

Provide realistic scores out of 100 for:

• Technical Skills
• Project Experience
• Industry Readiness
• Learning Potential

Also calculate an Overall Career Readiness Score.

Example format:

📊 CAREER READINESS SCORE

Overall Career Readiness: XX/100

Technical Skills: XX%
Project Experience: XX%
Industry Readiness: XX%
Learning Potential: XX%

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

💰 EXPECTED SALARY RANGE

Based on the recommended career path, provide estimated salary ranges in India.

Format:

💰 EXPECTED SALARY RANGE

Internship:
₹X,XXX – ₹XX,XXX / month

Fresher (0–2 years):
₹X – XX LPA

Experienced (2–5 years):
₹X – XX LPA

Senior Level (5+ years):
₹XX – XX LPA

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━



FORMATTING RULES

Use this separator line between every major section:

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Example:

AI Career Assessment Report

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

👤 STUDENT INFORMATION

Student Name: Duru

Branch: EXTC

Skills: C++

Interests: IoT, AI

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

📝 PROFILE SUMMARY

Strengths:
• Electronics & Telecommunication background
• C++ programming skills
• Strong interest in IoT and AI

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

🚀 TOP CAREER MATCHES

...

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

💪 STRENGTHS

...

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

⚠️ SKILL GAPS

...

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

📊 CAREER READINESS SCORE

...

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

💰 EXPECTED SALARY RANGE

...

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

📚 LEARNING ROADMAP

...

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

END OF REPORT

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Always place one blank line before and after the separator.
